arts.ttl: Matty Cash on 'watching a lot of' Celtic as Aston Villa star reveals what he expects from Hoops in Champions League
arts.sum: Villa, on the other hand, are determined to finish in the automatic qualifying spots and they know they need a positive result following Unai Emery’s rage at defeat to AS Monaco last week. Defender Matty Cash admits that the Premier League outfit know what they need to do in the Battle of Britain tonight and he feels his side are in the right frame of mind to get the job done.

arts.ttl: Celtic striker hunt hits overdrive as Evan Ferguson transfer insider breaks rank and Kvistgaarden talks 'in full swing'
arts.sum: A new frontman is top of the agenda for the Hoops as they look to replace Kyogo before the end of the window

arts.ttl: Aston Villa send Chelsea loan offer for Axel Disasi
arts.sum: According to L’Équipe journalist Loïc Tanzi, Premier League side Aston Villa have sent their first offer to Chelsea for defender Axel Disasi (26). Tanzi reports that the France international is hoping to leave…

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou dropped the ball at Tottenham after Celtic complete £10m January transfer deal
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou’s £10m Celtic mistake could prove costly for Spurs With Kyogo’s scoring record both in the domestic game and on the continent, the 30-year-old could have been a good option/stop gap for the Premier League to get them out of trouble for the remainder of this season.

arts.ttl: How Kyogo Furuhashi has broken European record without making Rennes debut
arts.sum: Kyogo Furuhashi has already broken a European record without making his debut for Rennes.

arts.ttl: A Celtic legend is the reason John McGinn wears the number seven shirt at Aston Villa
arts.sum: But there is a reason and meaning behind that famous number for the all-action midfielder, as he shared that he wears it because of one, Henrik Larsson . “Is Henrik Larsson the reason I wear the number seven?

arts.ttl: McGinn family 'poker faces' ahead of Aston Villa game
arts.sum: Aston Villa captain John McGinn's family and friends have travelled down to Birmingham for the game.

arts.ttl: Report: Aston Villa believe they can persuade £10m player to join them instead of Arsenal before deadline day
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard has tried to convince the 18-year-old to join Arsenal 🤯

arts.ttl: “Wants to join Aston Villa” – Offer in from Monchi and player snubs others for Birmingham move
arts.sum: Earlier today, we covered a report from Villarreal’s local media which stated Aston Villa made an offer to sign Juan Foyth and then suddenly went cool on the idea of getting the Argentine defender. There’s a very good chance that’s due to Foyth’s fitness situation, with him still easing his way back into action after The post “Wants to join Aston Villa” – Offer in from Monchi and player snubs others for Birmingham move appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: I played for Aston Villa and Celtic - this is why Unai Emery's side can win Champions League - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: Stiliyan Petrov has opened up about his love for Aston Villa and Celtic - as both those teams prepare to face off in the Champions League on Wednesday night. Both teams are playing very good football, with two great managers.
